data.title: Orderly Network: Mantle on-chain deposits have been reopened
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Orderly Network announced that deposits on the Mantle chain have been reopened. Previously, due to the hacker attack on Bybit and a large amount of funds being transferred, Orderly temporarily suspended the deposit business on the Mantle chain.

data.title: Binance Market Update (2025-02-22)
data.description:
The global cryptocurrency market cap now stands at $3.25T, up by 1.64% over the last day, according to CoinMarketCap data.

Bitcoin (BTC) has been trading between $94,872 and $99,475 over the past 24 hours. As of 09:30 AM (UTC) today, BTC is trading at $96,359, down by -2.05%.

Most major cryptocurrencies by market cap are trading lower. Market outperformers include STMX, PNUT, and SOLV, up by 44%, 10%, and 10%, respectively.

Top stories of the day:

Whales Accumulate 930,000 LTC Over Two Weeks

ZachXBT：Lazarus Group Transfers 5000 ETH Amid Bybit Incident

Ethereum ETF Experiences Significant Outflow

Bybit Loses Significant Assets in Cyberattack

U.S. Senators Urge SEC To Reevaluate Crypto ETF Staking

ByBit Hack Update: Bybit CEO Expresses Gratitude to Crypto Community, Highlights Binance’s Immediate Support

ByBit Hack: Bybit Hackers Move 490,000 ETH Across 49 Addresses, 15,000 cmETH Still Pending Unstake

Binance Co-Founder and Former CEO Offer Support Amid ByBit's $1.4 Billion ETH Hack

U.S. Consumer Sentiment Falls Short of Expectations in February

U.S. February PMI Data Shows Mixed Economic Signals

Iowa Proposes Bill to Allow State Treasury Investments in Bitcoin

BinaryX Rebrands to Four: A New Era in DeFi and Meme Fair Launches

data.title: Mask Network founder: Some ETH has been deposited back to Bybit
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily reported that Mask Network founder Suji Yan posted on the X platform that he had deposited some ETH back to Bybit, and there was probably less than 10 million US dollars in the public address, and he would continue to support it.

data.title: Orderly Network Reopens Deposits On Mantle Chain After Security Incident
data.description: According to Odaily, Orderly Network has announced the reopening of deposits on the Mantle chain. This decision follows a temporary suspension that was implemented after a significant security breach at Bybit, which resulted in the transfer of substantial funds. The suspension was a precautionary measure to ensure the safety and integrity of the network.

data.title: Cryptocurrency Market Sentiment Shifts To Neutral
data.description: According to Foresight News, data from Alternative.me indicates that the cryptocurrency Fear and Greed Index has decreased to 49 today, down from 55 yesterday, which was considered a 'Greed' state. This change suggests that the market sentiment has shifted to a 'Neutral' state.

data.title: Galaxy CEO calls on global leaders to take action against hacker group Lazarus Group
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Galaxy CEO Mike Novogratz posted on the X platform calling on global leaders to take action against the hacker organization Lazarus Group, while praising Bybit for completing a world-class solution after being attacked.

data.title: Bybit Incident Leaves Market Sentiment Unchanged
data.description:
According to PANews, recent data from Alternative indicates that the Bybit incident has not significantly impacted the Fear and Greed Index. Today, the index decreased to 49 from yesterday's 55, shifting from a state of greed to neutral, without moving into the 'fear' category.

The Fear and Greed Index ranges from 0 to 100 and is composed of several indicators: volatility (25%), market trading volume (25%), social media activity (15%), market surveys (15%), Bitcoin's market dominance (10%), and Google Trends analysis (10%).

data.title: Galaxy CEO Urges Global Action Against Lazarus Group
data.description: According to PANews, Galaxy CEO Mike Novogratz has called on global leaders to take action against the hacker organization Lazarus Group. He made this appeal on the X platform, highlighting the need for a coordinated international response. Novogratz also praised Bybit for its world-class resolution efforts following a recent attack.

data.title: ETH rebounds and breaks through 2700 USDT
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News OKX market data shows that ETH rebounded and broke through 2700 USDT and is now at 2707 USDT. The 24-hour decline narrowed to 2.74%.

data.title: VINE rose above 0.04 USDT, with a 24-hour increase of 30.96%
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Bitget market data shows that VINE rose above 0.04 USDT and is currently trading at 0.0423 USDT, with a 24-hour increase of 30.96%.
